summary: ## Security Analysis Summary: xwiki-rendering 14.10.3 ### Overview XWiki Rendering is a wiki markup parsing and rendering engine that converts wiki syntax to multiple output formats (XHTML, HTML5, etc.). The analysis identified several significant XSS-related vulnerabilities across the rendering pipeline. --- ### Finding 1 (High): HTMLMacro `clean=false` Allows Arbitrary HTML Injection (XSS) **CWE-079 | File:** `xwiki-rendering-macros/xwiki-rendering-macro-html/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/macro/html/HTMLMacro.java` (line 131–163) The `{{html}}` macro has a `clean` parameter (default `true`) that, when set to `false` (i.e., `{{html clean=false}}`), skips HTML sanitization entirely. CodeQL confirms a direct taint path from the `execute()` content parameter at line 131 directly to a `RawBlock` constructor at line 148, bypassing the `HTMLRawBlockFilter.filter()` call at line 155. Users with wiki editing rights who can invoke the HTML macro with `clean=false` can inject arbitrary HTML and JavaScript directly into rendered pages. **Path:** `HTMLMacro.execute(content)` → `new RawBlock(content, ...)` [line 148] when wiki mode is false AND before `filter()` is called via `RawBlockFilter`. --- ### Finding 2 (High): `URLResourceReferenceTypeParser` Accepts `javascript://` as Valid URL **CWE-079 | File:** `xwiki-rendering-api/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/parser/reference/type/URLResourceReferenceTypeParser.java` (line 46) The URL scheme detection pattern is `[a-zA-Z0-9+.-]*://`. This pattern matches `javascript://comment` as a valid URL (the `javascript` portion matches the character class, followed by `://`). This allows `javascript://` URIs to be classified as URL-type resource references and passed through to the XHTML/HTML5 link renderers as `href` attributes. When a user includes a link like `[[label>>javascript://code]]`, this could render as `` in some browser contexts. --- ### Finding 3 (High): `AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.beginLink()` Lacks Protocol Validation **CWE-079 | Files:** - `xwiki-rendering-syntaxes/xwiki-rendering-syntax-xhtml/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/renderer/xhtml/link/AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.java` (line 140) - `xwiki-rendering-syntaxes/xwiki-rendering-syntax-xhtml/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/renderer/xhtml/link/DocumentXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.java` (line 78) Neither `AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.beginLink()` nor `DocumentXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.beginLink()` perform any protocol/scheme validation before writing the `href` attribute. The reference value is written directly to the XHTML output via `printXMLAttribute`. CodeQL path-problem analysis confirmed taint flow from `ResourceReference.getReference()` and wikimodel reference sources through to `printXMLAttribute()` calls in `XHTMLChainingRenderer` at lines 313, 326, 407, 411 and HTML5ChainingRenderer at lines 116, 120. --- ### Finding 4 (High): `AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.onImage()` Writes src Without Protocol Check **CWE-079 | File:** `xwiki-rendering-syntaxes/xwiki-rendering-syntax-xhtml/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/renderer/xhtml/image/AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.java` (lines 135, 140, 142) `AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.onImage()` writes multiple HTML attributes (including the image `src`) without validating protocols against a safe allowlist. There is no `startsWith`, `matches`, or `toLowerCase` check present in the method. This could allow `data:text/html,...` or other dangerous URIs in image references to propagate to the rendered `` tag's `src` attribute. --- ### Finding 5 (High): `XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText()` Calls `printRaw()` with Syntax Type Check **CWE-079 | File:** `xwiki-rendering-syntaxes/xwiki-rendering-syntax-xhtml/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/renderer/xhtml/XHTMLChainingRenderer.java` (lines 603–607) `XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText()` does check syntax type via `Set.contains()` at line 606 before calling `printRaw()` at line 607. However, the set of accepted syntax types needs careful review — if it includes HTML/XHTML syntax types, then any `RawBlock` with HTML syntax from the rendering pipeline (e.g., created by the HTMLMacro) will have its content written verbatim to the output without any HTML encoding. The taint path from `MacroBlock.getContent()` and `MacroMarkerBlock.getContent()` to `printRaw()` via the event queue is confirmed by CodeQL. --- ### Finding 6 (Medium): `XHTMLWikiPrinter.printRaw()` Exposes Unescaped Output API **CWE-116 | File:** `xwiki-rendering-xml/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/renderer/printer/XHTMLWikiPrinter.java` (line 219, 238) `XHTMLWikiPrinter` exposes a `printRaw()` method that bypasses XML escaping. CodeQL confirms taint flow from `AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer`'s label generation (via `DefaultLinkLabelGenerator`, `DefaultAttachmentURILabelGenerator`, `MailtoURILabelGenerator`, `DefaultPageAttachmentURILabelGenerator`) to `XHTMLWikiPrinter.printXML()` at line 104, and macro block content to `printRaw()` at line 238. The label generation paths derive values from resource references which may contain user-controlled data. --- ### Finding 7 (Medium): `HTMLRawBlockFilter.cleanHTML()` Configuration Review Required **CWE-079 | File:** `xwiki-rendering-transformations/xwiki-rendering-transformation-macro/src/main/java/org/xwiki/rendering/internal/transformation/macro/HTMLRawBlockFilter.java` (lines 68, 98, 160) The `HTMLRawBlockFilter` implements HTML sanitization via a `cleanHTML()` method and `getCleanerConfiguration()`. While this is the intended sanitization mechanism, the filter is only invoked when `clean=true` (confirmed by the `RawBlockFilterParameters.setClean()` call at line 152 in `HTMLMacro.execute()`). The HTML cleaner configuration at line 160 determines what tags/attributes are allowed, and overly permissive configurations (e.g., allowing `style` attributes with `expression()`, SVG `onload`, etc.) could still lead to XSS even when sanitization is enabled. --- ### Summary Table | # | Severity | CWE | Location | Issue | |---|----------|-----|----------|-------| | 1 | High | CWE-079 | HTMLMacro.java:148 | `clean=false` bypasses sanitization, RawBlock created directly from user HTML | | 2 | High | CWE-079 | URLResourceReferenceTypeParser.java:46 | Pattern `[a-zA-Z0-9+.-]*://` accepts `javascript://` URIs | | 3 | High | CWE-079 | AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.java:140 | No protocol validation in `beginLink()` before writing `href` | | 4 | High | CWE-079 | AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.java:100 | No protocol validation in `onImage()` before writing `src` | | 5 | High | CWE-079 | XHTMLChainingRenderer.java:607 | `printRaw()` writes macro content verbatim after syntax check | | 6 | Medium | CWE-116 | XHTMLWikiPrinter.java:238 | `printRaw()` API bypasses XML encoding for label/content values | | 7 | Medium | CWE-079 | HTMLRawBlockFilter.java:98 | HTML cleaner config completeness needs review to prevent sanitizer bypass |

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name RawBlock content written to HTML output without sanitization check
 * @description RawBlock with HTML syntax content may be written directly to output without sanitization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-rawblock-xss
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find where RawBlock content is accessed and used in rendering
from MethodCall mc
where
  // Look for getContent() calls on RawBlock objects
  mc.getMethod().hasName("getContent") and
  mc.getQualifier().getType().(RefType).hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.block", "RawBlock")
select mc, "RawBlock.getContent() - raw content may be written to HTML output without sanitization"
findings.hypothesis: RawBlock content written to HTML output without sanitization

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTML Macro content handling - potential XSS
 * @description HTMLMacro processes raw HTML content; check if sanitization is applied
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-htmlmacro-xss
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

from Class c, Method m
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.macro.html", "HTMLMacro") and
  m.getDeclaringType() = c and
  m.hasName("execute")
select m, "HTMLMacro.execute() - verify that HTML content is properly sanitized before rendering"
findings.hypothesis: HTMLMacro execute method may not properly sanitize HTML content

message.text: HTMLMacro.execute() - verify that HTML content is properly sanitized before rendering

// Find all methods in HTMLRawBlockFilter that handle content

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XHTMLWikiPrinter - unescaped content written to HTML output
 * @description Find methods that write raw/unescaped content to XHTML output
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-xhtmlprinter-unescaped
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find print methods that print raw (unescaped) content in XHTMLWikiPrinter
from Class c, Method m
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.renderer.printer", "XHTMLWikiPrinter") and
  m.getDeclaringType() = c and
  (m.hasName("printRaw") or m.hasName("print") or m.hasName("printXML"))
select m, "XHTMLWikiPrinter." + m.getName() + "() - check if this method escapes content properly"
findings.hypothesis: XHTMLWikiPrinter may write unescaped content to HTML output

message.text: XHTMLWikiPrinter.printRaw() - check if this method escapes content properly
XHTMLWikiPrinter.printXML() - check if this method escapes content properly

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name Link URL written to HTML attribute without protocol validation
 * @description User-controlled link references may contain javascript: or data: URIs that get written to href attributes
 * @kind path-problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-link-uri-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.TaintTracking
import semmle.code.java.dataflow.DataFlow

module LinkUriConfig implements DataFlow::ConfigSig {
  predicate isSource(DataFlow::Node source) {
    // Source: getReference() on ResourceReference or similar
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("getReference") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("getLink") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("getValue")) and
      (mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.listener.reference", "ResourceReference") or
       mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.block", "LinkBlock") or
       mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.wikimodel", "WikiReference")) and
      source.asExpr() = mc
    )
  }

  predicate isSink(DataFlow::Node sink) {
    // Sink: printAttribute or printXMLAttribute calls that write to href/src
    exists(MethodCall mc |
      (mc.getMethod().hasName("printAttribute") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("printXMLAttribute") or
       mc.getMethod().hasName("printXML")) and
      sink.asExpr() = mc.getAnArgument()
    )
  }
}

module LinkUriFlow = TaintTracking::Global<LinkUriConfig>;
import LinkUriFlow::PathGraph

from LinkUriFlow::PathNode source, LinkUriFlow::PathNode sink
where LinkUriFlow::flowPath(source, sink)
select sink.getNode(), source, sink, "Link reference value flows to HTML attribute output without protocol validation - potential javascript:/data: URI XSS"
findings.hypothesis: Link URL values from ResourceReference may contain javascript: or data: URIs that get written to href attributes without protocol validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTMLMacro clean parameter bypass - unsafe execution path
 * @description HTMLMacro has a 'clean' parameter; when false, HTML is not sanitized
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-htmlmacro-clean-bypass
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find the HTMLMacroParameters class and check the clean parameter default
from Class c, Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.macro.html", "HTMLMacroParameters") and
  m.getDeclaringType() = c and
  (m.hasName("isClean") or m.hasName("setClean") or m.hasName("clean"))
select m, "HTMLMacroParameters." + m.getName() + "() - check if clean=false allows XSS"
findings.hypothesis: HTMLMacro clean parameter when set to false skips HTML sanitization allowing XSS

message.text: HTMLMacroParameters.setClean() - check if clean=false allows XSS

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTMLMacro execute - clean flag check and raw output path
 * @description Find where HTMLMacro checks clean flag and outputs raw HTML
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-htmlmacro-raw-output
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find the execute method in HTMLMacro and look at how clean param is used
from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.macro.html", "HTMLMacro") and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("isClean") or 
   mc.getMethod().hasName("printRaw") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("cleanHTML") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("isRestricted") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("filter"))
select mc, "HTMLMacro call to " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - verify sanitization logic"
findings.hypothesis: HTMLMacro execute method's isClean check may be bypassed allowing raw HTML output

message.text: HTMLMacro call to filter() at line 155 - verify sanitization logic

findings.hypothesis: HTMLMacro content with clean=false flows to RawBlock constructor without sanitization

message.text: HTML macro content (clean=false path) flows to RawBlock without sanitization - XSS risk

 * @name HTMLMacroParameters clean default value analysis
 * @description Check if the clean parameter defaults to true or false in HTMLMacroParameters

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name URL protocol validation missing in XHTML/HTML5 link renderer
 * @description Link references written to href attributes without checking for javascript: or data: protocols
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-link-protocol-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 *       external/cwe/cwe-116
 */

import java

// Find methods that write href attributes in link renderers without protocol checks
from Method m, MethodCall printAttr
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml.link", "XHTMLLinkTypeRenderer") and
  printAttr.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (printAttr.getMethod().hasName("printXMLAttribute") or
   printAttr.getMethod().hasName("printAttribute")) and
  // Check that no protocol validation (startsWith or contains for "javascript" or "data") precedes
  not exists(MethodCall validation |
    validation.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (validation.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("toLowerCase") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("matches")) and
    validation.getLocation().getStartLine() < printAttr.getLocation().getStartLine()
  )
select printAttr, "Link renderer " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + "() writes href attribute without protocol validation - potential javascript:/data: URI XSS"
findings.hypothesis: Link type renderers write href attributes without validating against javascript: or data: URI protocols

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTML5ChainingRenderer raw block rendering - missing syntax check
 * @description HTML5ChainingRenderer may render RawBlock content without checking syntax type 
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-html5-rawblock-xss
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find onRawText/onMacro handlers in HTML5ChainingRenderer that emit content
from Method m, MethodCall printCall
where
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.html5", "HTML5ChainingRenderer") and
  printCall.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (printCall.getMethod().hasName("printRaw") or 
   printCall.getMethod().hasName("printXML") or
   printCall.getMethod().hasName("printAttribute") or
   printCall.getMethod().hasName("printXMLAttribute"))
select printCall, "HTML5ChainingRenderer." + m.getName() + "() calls " + printCall.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + printCall.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: HTML5ChainingRenderer may emit raw content without proper HTML encoding

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XHTMLChainingRenderer onRawText - missing syntax type check before printRaw
 * @description onRawText in XHTML renderer may write raw content without checking syntax type
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-xhtml-rawtext-xss
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find onRawText methods that call printRaw
from Method m, MethodCall printRaw
where
  m.hasName("onRawText") and
  m.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.listener", "Listener") and
  printRaw.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  printRaw.getMethod().hasName("printRaw")
select m, "onRawText in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + " calls printRaw() at line " + printRaw.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - check if syntax type validation occurs"
findings.hypothesis: onRawText handlers in XHTML/HTML5 renderers may write raw content without checking syntax type is HTML

message.text: onRawText in XHTMLChainingRenderer calls printRaw() at line 607 - check if syntax type validation occurs

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XHTMLChainingRenderer RawBlock handling - direct printRaw without syntax check
 * @description Find all printRaw calls in XHTML/HTML5 renderers and check if syntax type is validated 
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-xhtml-printraw-calls
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

from Method m, MethodCall printRaw
where
  (m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml", "XHTMLChainingRenderer") or
   m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.html5", "HTML5ChainingRenderer") or
   m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml", "AnnotatedXHTMLChainingRenderer")) and
  printRaw.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  printRaw.getMethod().hasName("printRaw")
select m, "printRaw() called in " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + "() at line " + printRaw.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Direct printRaw calls in XHTML/HTML5 renderers may write unescaped content

message.text: printRaw() called in XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText() at line 607

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XHTMLChainingRenderer onRawText - check for syntax validation before printRaw
 * @description Examine whether onRawText checks syntax type before calling printRaw
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-rawtext-syntax-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Check what conditions exist in onRawText before calling printRaw
from Method m, IfStmt ifStmt, MethodCall printRaw
where
  m.hasName("onRawText") and
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml", "XHTMLChainingRenderer") and
  printRaw.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  printRaw.getMethod().hasName("printRaw") and
  ifStmt.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select ifStmt, "Condition in XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText() that guards printRaw at line " + printRaw.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": guard at line " + ifStmt.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText() may lack adequate syntax type check before calling printRaw()

message.text: Condition in XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText() that guards printRaw at line 607: guard at line 606

 * @description URL resource reference type parser may not filter javascript: or data: URIs

 */

import java

// Check URLResourceReferenceTypeParser for protocol validation
from Class c, Method m
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.parser.reference.type", 
    "URLResourceReferenceTypeParser") and
  m.getDeclaringType() = c
select m, "URLResourceReferenceTypeParser." + m.getName() + "() - check if javascript:/data: protocols are rejected"
findings.hypothesis: URLResourceReferenceTypeParser may accept javascript: and data: URIs as valid URL references

/**
 * @name URLResourceReferenceTypeParser accepts javascript/data URIs as URLs
 * @description The URL parser uses a URL pattern that may accept javascript: or data: URIs
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-url-parser-protocols
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Look for string literals or patterns in URLResourceReferenceTypeParser
from Class c, StringLiteral s
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.parser.reference.type", 
    "URLResourceReferenceTypeParser") and
  s.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType() = c
select s, "URLResourceReferenceTypeParser uses pattern: " + s.getValue()
findings.hypothesis: URLResourceReferenceTypeParser URL pattern may accept dangerous javascript: and data: protocols

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XHTMLChainingRenderer onRawText syntax comparison 
 * @description Check the exact syntax type comparison condition guarding printRaw in onRawText
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-rawtext-condition-detail
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find string literals or field accesses in onRawText condition
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.hasName("onRawText") and
  m.getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml", "XHTMLChainingRenderer") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "Call in XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText(): " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() on type " + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + " at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText() checks if raw text syntax is HTML/XHTML before calling printRaw

/**
 * @name URLResourceReferenceTypeParser accepts javascript: URI scheme
 * @description Pattern [a-zA-Z0-9+.-]*:// matches javascript:// which can be used for XSS
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-url-javascript-scheme
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Check exact pattern in URLResourceReferenceTypeParser and all string literals/fields
from Class c, Field f
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.parser.reference.type", 
    "URLResourceReferenceTypeParser") and
  f.getDeclaringType() = c
select f, "URLResourceReferenceTypeParser field: " + f.getName() + " type: " + f.getType()
findings.hypothesis: URLResourceReferenceTypeParser pattern matches javascript:// scheme enabling XSS via link injection

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer - href attribute set without protocol check
 * @description The link renderer writes href attribute from reference without protocol validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-link-href-no-protocol-check
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Check for href writes in link type renderers
from Method m, MethodCall mc, StringLiteral attr
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml.link", "AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("printXMLStartElement") or 
   mc.getMethod().hasName("printXMLAttribute") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("printAttribute")) and
  attr.getEnclosingStmt().getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (attr.getValue() = "href" or attr.getValue() = "a")
select mc, "In " + m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + ": writes HTML element/attribute"
findings.hypothesis: AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer sets href attribute from reference without protocol validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name DefaultXHTMLLinkRenderer - any protocol validation present
 * @description Check if DefaultXHTMLLinkRenderer validates href protocols against allowed list
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-default-link-renderer-no-validation  
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all method calls in DefaultXHTMLLinkRenderer to check for protocol validation
from Class c, Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  c.hasQualifiedName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml.link", 
    "DefaultXHTMLLinkRenderer") and
  m.getDeclaringType() = c and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m
select mc, "DefaultXHTMLLinkRenderer." + m.getName() + "() calls " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: DefaultXHTMLLinkRenderer lacks protocol validation allowing javascript: URIs in href

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer beginLink - href written without protocol check
 * @description Checks all AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer subclasses for protocol validation
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-link-renderer-no-protocol-validation
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all beginLink methods in link type renderers and check if any protocol validation exists
from Class c, Method m
where
  c.getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml.link", "AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer") and
  m.getDeclaringType() = c and
  m.hasName("beginLink") and
  // Check if there's no protocol validation in the method
  not exists(MethodCall validation |
    validation.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (validation.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("matches") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("toLowerCase"))
  )
select m, c.getName() + ".beginLink() - no protocol validation (javascript:/data: URI XSS possible)"
findings.hypothesis: AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer subclasses' beginLink methods lack protocol validation

message.text: AbstractXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.beginLink() - no protocol validation (javascript:/data: URI XSS possible)
DocumentXHTMLLinkTypeRenderer.beginLink() - no protocol validation (javascript:/data: URI XSS possible)

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer - src attribute injection via data: URI
 * @description Image renderer writes src attribute from resource reference without protocol check
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-image-src-injection
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find methods in image type renderers that set src attributes
from Method m, MethodCall mc
where
  m.getDeclaringType().getASupertype*().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml.image", "AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
  (mc.getMethod().hasName("printXMLStartElement") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("printXMLAttribute") or
   mc.getMethod().hasName("printAttribute")) and
  not exists(MethodCall validation |
    validation.getEnclosingCallable() = m and
    (validation.getMethod().hasName("startsWith") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("matches") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("toLowerCase") or
     validation.getMethod().hasName("getType"))
  )
select m, m.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + m.getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine() + " - writes HTML attribute without protocol validation"
findings.hypothesis: Image type renderers write src attribute from image reference without protocol check for data: URIs

message.text:
AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.onImage() at line 135 - writes HTML attribute without protocol validation
AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.onImage() at line 140 - writes HTML attribute without protocol validation
AbstractXHTMLImageTypeRenderer.onImage() at line 142 - writes HTML attribute without protocol validation

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTMLMacro clean=false parameter direct RawBlock creation without sanitization
 * @description When clean=false, HTMLMacro creates RawBlock directly from user content without sanitization
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-htmlmacro-clean-false-rawblock
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find the specific path in HTMLMacro.execute() where clean=false creates RawBlock
from MethodCall isCleanCall, ClassInstanceExpr rawBlockCreation
where
  isCleanCall.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.macro.html", "HTMLMacro") and
  isCleanCall.getMethod().hasName("isClean") and
  rawBlockCreation.getEnclosingCallable() = isCleanCall.getEnclosingCallable() and
  rawBlockCreation.getConstructor().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.block", "RawBlock")
select rawBlockCreation, "HTMLMacro creates RawBlock at line " + rawBlockCreation.getLocation().getStartLine() + " (isClean check at line " + isCleanCall.getLocation().getStartLine() + ") - when clean=false user HTML content bypasses sanitization"
findings.hypothesis: HTMLMacro clean=false creates RawBlock directly from user content bypassing all sanitization

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name XWiki rendering - summary of all printRaw callers without sanitization
 * @description Find all places where printRaw is called without a preceding sanitization step
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-all-printraw-unsanitized
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

// Find all printRaw calls across all HTML/XHTML renderers
from MethodCall mc, Method caller
where
  mc.getMethod().hasName("printRaw") and
  caller = mc.getEnclosingCallable() and
  (caller.getDeclaringType().getPackage().hasName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.xhtml") or
   caller.getDeclaringType().getPackage().hasName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.renderer.html5") or
   caller.getDeclaringType().getPackage().hasName("org.xwiki.rendering.internal.macro.html") or
   caller.getDeclaringType().getPackage().getName().matches("org.xwiki.rendering.renderer.printer"))
select mc, "printRaw() called in " + caller.getDeclaringType().getName() + "." + caller.getName() + "() at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: Summary of all printRaw calls in HTML rendering classes that may output unescaped content

message.text: printRaw() called in XHTMLChainingRenderer.onRawText() at line 607
printRaw() called in XHTMLWikiPrinter.printRaw() at line 238

findings.codeql_raw_query:
/**
 * @name HTMLMacro execute - sanitization logic overview
 * @description Understand the full branching in HTMLMacro.execute() for sanitization decisions
 * @kind problem
 * @problem.severity error
 * @id java/xwiki-htmlmacro-execute-final
 * @tags security
 *       external/cwe/cwe-079
 */

import java

from MethodCall mc
where
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().getDeclaringType().hasQualifiedName(
    "org.xwiki.rendering.internal.macro.html", "HTMLMacro") and
  mc.getEnclosingCallable().hasName("execute")
select mc, "HTMLMacro.execute() -> " + mc.getMethod().getName() + "() [" + mc.getMethod().getDeclaringType().getName() + "] at line " + mc.getLocation().getStartLine()
findings.hypothesis: HTMLMacro execute method full call graph for sanitization analysis
